# Paper 3 evidence-graph — narrative conflicts report

Disagreements the registry deliberately does NOT average away. Each is a surfaced config field / documented tension, not a merged constant.

## Gate-level conflict notes

| link | gate | conflict |
|---|---|---|
| `foster2025.infiltration::gate_infiltration_triangle` | `gate_infiltration_triangle` | Registry component tier is controlled_independent, but this gate's evidence is sign_or_compatibility on in-sample data (k from a kappa fitted to the same shot; front driven by that shot's own P(t); wide 1.86x porosity bracket). The 'independent' claim is not supported by the gate code. |
| `sourcing2026.g10_liquor_rheology::gate_g10_intersource_spread` | `gate_g10_intersource_spread` | khomyakov2020's measured kinematic viscosity (converted via rho*nu) runs systematically ~+37% ABOVE the telisromero2001 Eq-10 closure across the Xw 76-90% / T 295-365 K overlap (median 25-50%, max <60%) — a bounded material/instrument offset (Russian production extract vs Brazilian 51-Brix batch) agreeing in sign but quantifying the G10 absolute-magnitude uncertainty at concentrated in-pore strengths. |
| `sourcing2026.g10_liquor_rheology::gate_g10_reference_mu_above_water` | `gate_g10_reference_mu_above_water` | The envelope estimate this gate checks (~1.3-1.9x water, 4-6e-4 Pa.s) conflicts with the Telis-Romero-2001 Eq-10 closure reconstruction (gate_g10_telisromero_closure), which puts BULK shot-TDS mu at only ~1.06x water and reassigns the ~1.3-2x magnitude to concentrated early in-pore liquor (Xw~76%), not bulk shot TDS. |

## Un-reconciled published constants (surfaced, not merged)

### c_sat (saturation concentration, kg/m^3)
Per ROADMAP §5.4: 212.4 kg/m^3 is a single shared-provenance value across cameron2020/lee2023/moroney2016/egidi2024; grudeva's paper (224) and thesis (170) sets disagree with it and each other (grudeva card-of-record reconciliation is ROADMAP item 1.7a). The value is a surfaced config field, never a merged constant.

_Authoritative reconciliation: docs/ROADMAP.md §5.4._

| value | source(s) |
|---|---|
| 170 | `grudeva2023 (thesis)` |
| 212.4 | `cameron2020`, `lee2023`, `moroney2016`, `egidi2024` |
| 224 | `grudeva2026 (paper)` |
